name: Birchwood Hard Money Tampa FL
description_short: Direct hard money lender in Tampa offering fast real estate investment loans with up to 70% LTV, no brokers, and approvals within 24 hours since 1978.
description_long:
Birchwood Hard Money has been operating in Florida since 1978 and specializes in hard money lending for real estate investors, with over 25 years specifically in the Tampa market. They have funded more than 300 hard money loans to investors in the Tampa area and position themselves as a direct lender rather than a broker, eliminating intermediary fees.

The company offers hard money loans for real estate investment, ranging from 7.9% to 12.95% APR with loan-to-value ratios up to 70% and flexible terms from 1 to 30 years. They finance purchases, refinances, and debt consolidation. Notably, Birchwood advertises quick approvals (within 24 hours) and funding as soon as paperwork is ready. They structure loans around interest-only payments and do not require appraisals or consider credit scores, recent foreclosures, or self-employment status in their underwriting.

Birchwood differentiates itself primarily through being a direct lender with no broker involvement, which they claim reduces fees and costs. They emphasize personalized service with dedicated account executives, responsive communication throughout the loan process, and a stated commitment to borrower success through ongoing support and coaching. A significant portion of their business reportedly comes from repeat customers.

As a hard money lender, this company is best suited for real estate investors and flippers who need rapid capital access and can tolerate higher interest rates in exchange for speed and flexible credit requirements. However, borrowers should understand that hard money loans carry substantially higher costs than conventional mortgages, and the lack of regulatory oversight typical in hard money lending means thorough due diligence is essential before committing.
pros: Direct lender model eliminates broker fees and appraisal costs entirely
Exceptionally fast approvals within 24 hours with funding upon paperwork completion
Highest LTV available at 70% compared to stated 60% baseline, with flexible 1-30 year terms
Does not require credit checks, recent foreclosure/short sale history, or self-employment verification
Over 35 years combined real estate experience with 300+ funded loans in Tampa area
Competitive rate range of 7.9%-12.95% APR for hard money products
Personalized account executive support throughout entire loan lifecycle
cons: Hard money loans carry significantly higher interest rates (7.9%-12.95%) compared to conventional mortgages (typically 3-7%)
Limited to 70% LTV maximum, requiring 30% down payment minimum, restricting applicants without substantial equity or capital
Website lacks transparent fee disclosure beyond claiming 'no hidden fees' — origination fees, servicing fees, and prepayment penalties are not itemized
No independent third-party reviews, ratings, or regulatory complaint history available on website to verify service quality claims
Interest-only payment structure means borrowers build no equity during loan term, creating refinance necessity at maturity
best_for: Real estate investors and house flippers needing rapid capital for time-sensitive deal closures
Borrowers with damaged credit or recent foreclosure/short sale history who cannot access conventional financing
Self-employed investors or business owners unable to document income through traditional W-2/tax return verification
diagnosis: Birchwood is designed specifically for real estate investors and borrowers with credit challenges who prioritize speed and flexibility over cost-efficiency. The primary caveat is that hard money loans are expensive alternatives to conventional mortgages and should only be used when conventional financing is unavailable or the time-value of a rapid close justifies the 8-13% interest rates.
services: Hard money loans for real estate investment purchases
Bad credit home loans without credit score requirements
Loan terms ranging from 1 to 30 years
Quick quote and application system online
Personal account executive assignment and dedicated support
Real estate investment coaching and support services
